title: Allogene Therapeutics Showcases Momentum with Clinical and Platform Advancements in Allogeneic CAR T at AACR 2026
text: Allogene showcased its clinical and platform advancements at the American Association for Cancer Research (AACR) Annual Meeting in 2026. The company presented multiple scientific abstracts highlighting progress across its pipeline programs including ALPHA3 data in large B-cell lymphoma consolidation and preclinical data from its expanded platform. These presentations demonstrated the company's commitment to advancing allogeneic CAR T technology and expanding its product portfolio across oncology and autoimmune indications.
